Jose Mourinho is likely to give an update on his squad during his pre-match press conference on Friday. While former United men Darren Fletcher and Mame Biram Diouf are set to recover from minor knee injuries to feature against their former club but Hughes confirmed in his pre-match media briefing that another ex-Red, captain Ryan Shawcross, is set to miss out with a back problem although Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting is hoping to be fit after struggling with a hamstring injury.
